subject: Production API returns 503
body: Our checkout integration is down in production and every API request fails with a 503 error.

subject: Refund for duplicate charge
body: We were charged twice on invoice 8841. Please issue a refund for the duplicate payment.

subject: Locked out after MFA reset
body: The admin is locked out and cannot sign in after changing the MFA device.

subject: How do I add a new teammate?
body: Where can I invite another user and choose their permissions?

subject: Suspicious login from another country
body: We saw an unauthorized login and suspect a security breach. Please investigate urgently.

subject: Invoice address is wrong
body: Please update the billing address shown on our next invoice.

subject: Desktop client crashes on launch
body: The Windows app crashes immediately after installing version 6.2.

subject: Question about feature availability
body: What plan includes the advanced reporting feature?

subject: Phishing email sent to staff
body: Several employees received a phishing message that links to a fake sign-in page.

subject: Subscription upgrade request
body: Please upgrade our subscription to the enterprise plan next month.

subject: La integración devuelve un error
body: La integración de pagos no funciona y muestra un error después de instalar la actualización.

subject: Demande de remboursement
body: Je souhaite un remboursement pour un paiement incorrect sur la dernière facture.

subject: Documentation typo
body: There is a minor cosmetic typo in the API documentation. No urgent impact.

subject: Data export is extremely slow
body: Our nightly data export is slow and failed twice this week.

subject: Remove former employee access
body: Please disable a former employee and reset all active sessions today.

subject: Possible fraudulent card payment
body: A customer disputes this charge and believes the card payment is fraud.

subject: Webhook setup help
body: How can I enable webhooks for account updates? The documentation is unclear.

subject: Training for new agents
body: We need onboarding and training materials for six new support agents.

subject: Unbekannter Fehler bei Anmeldung
body: Die Anmeldung ist fehlgeschlagen und das Konto scheint gesperrt zu sein.

subject: Ajuda para acessar a conta
body: Não consigo acessar minha conta depois de trocar a senha.

subject: Critical malware alert
body: Endpoint monitoring found malware on a production workstation. We need urgent containment.

subject: Change payment method
body: Where do I replace the credit card used for our subscription payment?

subject: Enable sandbox environment
body: Please add a sandbox workspace for our integration testing team.

subject: Dashboard not loading
body: The analytics dashboard is not working and shows a blank page after login.

subject: Account ownership transfer
body: How do we transfer the administrator role to a different employee?

subject: Cancel and credit renewal
body: Please cancel the automatic renewal and credit the invoice generated yesterday.

subject: SSO certificate expires tomorrow
body: Our production SSO certificate expires tomorrow and users may be locked out.

subject: Request product roadmap
body: Can you share which reporting upgrades are planned this quarter?

subject: Integration rate limit question
body: What is the API rate limit and where can we see current usage?

subject: Unauthorized invoice recipient
body: A former vendor received our confidential invoice. This may be an unauthorized disclosure.
